steps.title: Spot the relationship signal
steps.content: The passage's final sentence directly establishes how Kenny and Lysyanskaya are connected: “Kenny and others like her helped make it possible for more women—such as Anna Lysyanskaya, who currently works in and teaches digital cryptography—to enter the field of cryptology.” Kenny is positioned as an early contributor, and Lysyanskaya as a current participant in the same field.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content:
Choice D captures the core relationship: Kenny's earlier contributions enabled Lysyanskaya's entry into the field.
The other options introduce elements the passage doesn't support—direct instruction (A), simultaneous careers (B), or an institutional connection (C).
That matches choice D — D is correct.
